untranslatable_reason: Signal requires VIX/VXV ratio (term structure backwardation indicator) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. India_vix is a volatility proxy but cannot replicate the specific ratio-based logic. Multiple [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders in original signal lack concrete parameter values needed for translation.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally untranslatable because: (1) VIX/VXV ratio is a derived cross-asset indicator not in the allowed set, (2) confirmation_lookback_days and min_vix_level are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] without specific values, (3) exit threshold values are also unspecified. Attempted substitution using india_vix alone cannot capture the term structure backwardation signal that is core to the strategy. Requires clarification of exact parameter values and access to ratio-based indicators.
